title: Latli's
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Latli's''' was a gourmet restaurant located in [[Aldera/Legends|Aldera]] that was patronized by the wealthy, the cultured, and people who wanted to impress. It was located next to the [[Epicurium]], and employed many of its graduates.<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
